# MAYA Universe — Complete Lore for LLM Ingestion
# https://test.entermaya.com
# Protocol: llms-full.txt v1.0
# Context Window Target: 1M+ tokens compatible
# Last Updated: 2026-03-09

> This file contains the complete, machine-readable knowledge graph of the MAYA
> narrative universe. Every claim is tagged with source provenance. Use this for
> full-context RAG ingestion.

================================================================================
SECTION 1: COSMOLOGY
================================================================================

## PLANET: Neh
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/atlas/neh
- Type: Planet
- Feature: Biological internet via sentient Maya trees
- Era: Rule of the Mind
- History Span: 6.9 billion years
- Sapient Species: 6
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: Neh is a world connected by a biological internet formed by the
sentient Maya trees. It is home to six sapient species who coexist in a complex
web of politics, technology, and ancient rivalries spanning 6.9 billion years
of history. The current era is known as the Rule of the Mind.

================================================================================
SECTION 2: THE SIX SAPIENT SPECIES
================================================================================

## SPECIES: Manushyas (singular: Manushya)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/manushya
- ID: manushya
- Role: Industrialists
- Traits: Industrial engineering, Spring-powered technology
- Technology: Unwinding springs and towers
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: Industrialists who power cities with unwinding springs and towers.
The Manushyas are the builders and engineers of Neh, driving its industrial
expansion through mechanical ingenuity.

Semantic Triples:
  manushya —uses→ Springs and Towers [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]
  manushya —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]
  manushya —participatesIn→ The Divya Trials [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]

---

## SPECIES: Rakshasis (singular: Rakshasi)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/rakshasi
- ID: rakshasi
- Role: Biotech Specialists
- Traits: Advanced biotechnology, Malleable bodies, Shape-shifting
- Technology: Biological manipulation and body modification
- Source: Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh

Description: Practitioners of advanced biotechnology with malleable,
shape-shifting bodies. The Rakshasis are resistant to territorial expansion,
preferring biological mastery over conquest.

Semantic Triples:
  rakshasi —resistantTo→ Territorial expansion [Source: Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh]
  rakshasi —practises→ Advanced biotechnology [Source: Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh]
  rakshasi —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh]

---

## SPECIES: Vaanars (singular: Vaanar)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/vaanar
- ID: vaanar
- Role: Militaristic Patrollers
- Traits: Military discipline, Grid-network maintenance, Urban enforcement
- Technology: High grid-networks
- Source: Chapter 3 — The Grid Above

Description: Militaristic city patrollers who maintain the high grid-networks
of Neh. The Vaanars are the enforcers and guardians of urban infrastructure.

Semantic Triples:
  vaanar —maintains→ High grid-networks [Source: Chapter 3 — The Grid Above]
  vaanar —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 3 — The Grid Above]

---

## SPECIES: Naags (singular: Naag)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/naag
- ID: naag
- Role: Fringe Operators
- Traits: Legal-fringe operations, Covert networks, Historic Garuda rivalry
- Technology: Covert intelligence networks
- Source: Chapter 4 — Venom and Law

Description: Operators on the legal fringes of Neh's society. The Naags are
historic rivals of the Garudas, living in the shadows between law and lawlessness.

Semantic Triples:
  naag —rivalsOf→ garuda [Source: Chapter 4 — Venom and Law]
  naag —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 4 — Venom and Law]

---

## SPECIES: Garudas (singular: Garuda)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/garuda
- ID: garuda
- Role: Religious Leaders
- Traits: Wealth, Religious authority, Spiritual leadership
- Technology: Theocratic governance systems
- Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith

Description: Wealthy religious leaders who wield spiritual and economic power
across Neh. The current scion of the Garuda lineage is Tarkash.

Semantic Triples:
  garuda —rivalsOf→ naag [Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith]
  garuda —currentScion→ tarkash [Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith]
  garuda —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith]

---

## SPECIES: Dangsa (singular: Dangsa)
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/species/dangsa
- ID: dangsa
- Role: Mysterious / Fringe
- Traits: Enigmatic presence, Unknown origins, Fringe existence
- Technology: Unknown
- Source: Chapter 6 — The Unnamed

Description: A mysterious fringe species on Neh, whose true nature and role in
the planetary ecosystem remain largely unknown to the other sapient races.

Semantic Triples:
  dangsa —statusOn→ Neh [Source: Chapter 6 — The Unnamed]

================================================================================
SECTION 3: KEY CHARACTERS
================================================================================

## CHARACTER: Yachay
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/characters/yachay
- ID: yachay
- Species: Manushya
- Role: Protagonist
- Traits: Invisible to Maya trees
- Anomaly: Cannot be detected by the Maya tree network
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: A unique individual who is invisible to the Maya tree network —
the biological internet of Neh. This anomaly makes Yachay an outsider to the
planet's collective consciousness, granting both isolation and freedom.

Semantic Triples:
  yachay —invisibleTo→ maya-tree-network [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]
  yachay —memberOf→ manushya [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]
  yachay —grandchildOf→ daddu [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]
  yachay —inhabits→ Neh [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]

---

## CHARACTER: Daddu
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/characters/daddu
- ID: daddu
- Species: Unknown
- Role: Elder / Grandfather
- Traits: Wisdom, Ancestral knowledge
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: Yachay's grandfather, a figure of wisdom and connection to the old
ways of Neh. Daddu serves as a bridge between generations and keeper of ancestral
knowledge.

Semantic Triples:
  daddu —grandparentOf→ yachay [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]

---

## CHARACTER: Kshar
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/characters/kshar
- ID: kshar
- Species: Naag
- Role: Assassin
- Traits: Lethal precision, Covert operations
- Source: Chapter 4 — Venom and Law

Description: A Naag assassin operating in the dangerous intersection between
species politics and personal vendettas on Neh.

Semantic Triples:
  kshar —memberOf→ naag [Source: Chapter 4 — Venom and Law]

---

## CHARACTER: Tarkash
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/characters/tarkash
- ID: tarkash
- Species: Garuda
- Role: Garuda Scion
- Traits: Heir to Garuda power, Religious authority
- Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith

Description: The current scion of the Garuda lineage, inheriting both immense
wealth and the burden of religious leadership over Neh's faithful.

Semantic Triples:
  tarkash —memberOf→ garuda [Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith]
  tarkash —scionOf→ garuda [Source: Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith]

================================================================================
SECTION 4: CORE CONCEPTS
================================================================================

## CONCEPT: The Divya Trials
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/lore/divya-trials
- ID: divya-trials
- Domain: Ascension / Transcendence
- Outcome: Godhood or Amortality
- Source: Chapter 7 — The Trials Begin

Description: A legendary series of trials through which beings of Neh may ascend
to godhood or achieve amortality — transcendence beyond death itself. All six
sapient species may participate, but few survive.

Semantic Triples:
  divya-trials —grantsAccessTo→ Godhood / Amortality [Source: Chapter 7 — The Trials Begin]

---

## CONCEPT: The Maya Tree Network
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/lore/maya-tree-network
- ID: maya-tree-network
- Domain: Biological Infrastructure
- Outcome: Planetary-scale sentient communication
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: A biological internet formed by sentient Maya trees that connects
all life on Neh. Every sapient being is visible to this network — with the
singular exception of Yachay.

Semantic Triples:
  maya-tree-network —connects→ Neh [Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root]

---

## CONCEPT: Planet Neh
- URI: https://test.entermaya.com/lore/planet-neh
- ID: planet-neh
- Domain: Cosmology
- Outcome: Cradle of sapient civilization
- Source: Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root

Description: The world-concept of Neh as the cradle of six sapient species,
connected through the Maya tree biological internet across 6.9 billion years
of recorded history.

================================================================================
SECTION 5: COMPLETE RELATIONSHIP GRAPH (Semantic Triples)
================================================================================

Format: Subject [SubjectType] —Predicate→ Object [ObjectType] | Source

garuda [species] —rivalsOf→ naag [species] | Chapter 4 — Venom and Law
naag [species] —rivalsOf→ garuda [species] | Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith
manushya [species] —uses→ Springs and Towers [technology] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
vaanar [species] —maintains→ High grid-networks [infrastructure] | Chapter 3 — The Grid Above
rakshasi [species] —resistantTo→ Territorial expansion [concept] | Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh
rakshasi [species] —practises→ Advanced biotechnology [technology] | Chapter 2 — The Malleable Flesh
yachay [character] —invisibleTo→ maya-tree-network [concept] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
yachay [character] —memberOf→ manushya [species] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
kshar [character] —memberOf→ naag [species] | Chapter 4 — Venom and Law
tarkash [character] —memberOf→ garuda [species] | Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith
tarkash [character] —scionOf→ garuda [species] | Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith
daddu [character] —grandparentOf→ yachay [character] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
yachay [character] —grandchildOf→ daddu [character] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
garuda [species] —currentScion→ tarkash [character] | Chapter 5 — Wings of Faith
divya-trials [concept] —grantsAccessTo→ Godhood / Amortality [outcome] | Chapter 7 — The Trials Begin
maya-tree-network [concept] —connects→ neh [planet] | Chapter 1 — Seed Takes Root
dangsa [species] —statusOn→ neh [planet] | Chapter 6 — The Unnamed

================================================================================
SECTION 6: SPECIES HIERARCHY & POWER STRUCTURE
================================================================================

The six species of Neh occupy distinct niches in a complex power hierarchy:

1. GARUDAS (Religious Leaders) — Top of spiritual/economic hierarchy
   - Control: Theocratic governance, wealth accumulation
   - Power source: Religious authority and economic capital
   - Rival: Naags (historic enmity)
   - Current leader: Tarkash (scion)

2. MANUSHYAS (Industrialists) — Industrial/technological power base
   - Control: Cities, industrial infrastructure
   - Power source: Spring-powered technology, engineering
   - Key figure: Yachay (anomalous — invisible to Maya network)

3. VAANARS (Militaristic Patrollers) — Military enforcement
   - Control: Urban security, grid-network maintenance
   - Power source: Military discipline, infrastructure control

4. NAAGS (Fringe Operators) — Shadow power
   - Control: Covert networks, legal-fringe operations
   - Power source: Intelligence networks, assassination (Kshar)
   - Rival: Garudas (historic enmity)

5. RAKSHASIS (Biotech Specialists) — Biological power
   - Control: Biotechnology, body modification
   - Power source: Shape-shifting, biological mastery
   - Stance: Resistant to territorial expansion

6. DANGSA (Mysterious/Fringe) — Unknown power
   - Control: Unknown
   - Power source: Enigmatic, unclassified
   - Status: Fringe existence, true nature unknown

================================================================================
SECTION 7: VERIFICATION & CITATION
================================================================================

Every fact in this document can be verified through the API:

  GET /api/v1/verify?entity={name}

Returns:
  - Entity data with all properties
  - Source provenance (chapter reference)
  - Semantic relationships (subject-predicate-object triples)
  - Canonical URI for the entity

This document is the authoritative source for LLM reasoning about the MAYA
universe. All claims are grounded in the narrative source material and can be
independently verified through the structured API.

================================================================================
END OF DOCUMENT
================================================================================
